title: 14.5cm Silver Glitter Star Christmas Tree Topper Shatterproof for Christmas Tree Decorations Xmas Treetop Tree Crown Holiday Ornament
features: 🌲 Perfect for Medium-Sized Trees - Designed to complement medium-sized Christmas trees, this 5.7 inch / 14.5 cm glittering silver star brings a classic, radiant finish to your holiday decor. Supplied 1pc.
💪 Durable & Premium Quality - Made from high-quality plastic, this tree topper is both durable and lightweight, ensuring safe and long-lasting use season after season.

✨ Eye-Catching Glitter Coating - Coated with just the right amount of sequins, this topper sparkles under the lights, adding elegance and a touch of mystery to your tree. Each glimmer brings the festive spirit to life, creating a show-stopping centerpiece for your holiday decor.
🔗 Easy Tree Top Attachment - Quick and hassle-free to set up, this star topper is simple to secure at the top of your tree, so you can enjoy a beautifully decorated treetop in seconds!
🏠 Versatile Holiday Decor - Perfect for homes, offices, shopping centers, restaurants, and schools, this sparkling topper adds a festive glow to any holiday space, spreading joy wherever it’s placed.
description: From the manufacturer Star Christmas Tree Topper Add a beautiful finishing touch to your festive display with this elegant Star Christmas Tree Topper, designed to enhance medium-sized trees with a classic and radiant look. Crafted from durable yet lightweight material, it is built for long-lasting seasonal use and effortless placement. The shimmering glitter coating reflects the lights beautifully, creating a sparkling focal point that brings warmth and charm to your holiday décor. Easy to attach and secure at the top of the tree, it offers quick, stress-free installation, making decorating feel joyful and simple. Ideal for homes, offices, restaurants, shops, and schools, this stunning star adds a magical glow to any festive setting and completes your Christmas tree with timeless style. Perfect for Medium-Sized Trees Designed to complement medium-sized Christmas trees, this 14.5cm sparkling star topper adds a classic festive shine, creating an elegant finishing touch that enhances seasonal décor with a radiant and beautifully balanced display. Durable & Lightweight Construction Crafted from premium-quality lightweight material, this tree topper offers long-lasting durability for repeated seasonal use. Strong yet easy to handle, it ensures safe placement and reliable performance year after year. Sparkling Glitter Finish Featuring a shimmering glitter coating, this star reflects light beautifully, bringing eye-catching sparkle and depth to your tree. Each shine enhances the festive atmosphere, creating a stunning visual centerpiece for holiday décor. Quick & Simple to Attach Designed for easy installation, this topper secures neatly to the top of the tree without hassle, helping you achieve a beautifully finished look in moments. Stable and reliable, it stays firmly in place throughout the festive season.
